strings.onboarding_description: Let\'s set some things up first. You can always change these in the settings later too.
strings.onboarding_storage_info:
Select a folder where %1$s will store chapter downloads, backups, and more.

A dedicated folder is recommended.

Selected folder: %2$s
strings.onboarding_storage_help_info: Updating from an older version and not sure what to select? Refer to the storage guide for more information.
strings.onboarding_permission_notifications_desc: Get notified for library updates and more.
strings.onboarding_permission_ignore_battery_opt: Avoid interruptions to long-running library updates, downloads, and backup restores.
strings.onboarding_permission_crashlytics_descri: Send anonymized crash logs to the developers.
strings.onboarding_permission_analytics_descript: Send anonymized usage data to improve app features.
strings.onboarding_guides_new_user: New to %s? We recommend checking out the getting started guide.
strings.firebase_summary: Sending crash logs and analytics will allow us to identify and fix issues, improve performance, and make future updates more relevant to your needs
strings.pref_mark_duplicate_read_chapter_read: Mark duplicate read chapter as read
strings.pref_disallow_non_ascii_filenames_detail: Ensures compatibility with certain storage media that don't support Unicode. When this is enabled, you'll need to manually rename source and manga folders by replacing non-ASCII characters with their lowercase UTF-8 hexadecimal representations. Chapter files don't need to be renamed.
strings.remove_private_extension_message: Do you really want to remove \"%s\" extension?
strings.ext_permission_install_apps_warning: Permissions are needed to install extensions. Tap here to grant.
strings.action_add_repo_message: Add additional repos to %s. This should be a URL that ends with \"index.min.json\".
strings.delete_repo_confirmation: Do you wish to delete the repo \"%s\"?
strings.add_repo_confirmation: Do you wish to add the repo \"%s\"?
strings.action_replace_repo_message: Repository %1$s has the same Signing Key Fingerprint as %2$s.\nIf this is expected, %2$s will be replaced, otherwise contact your repo maintainer.
strings.repo_finder_subtitle: Discover and add extension repositories with one tap.
strings.pref_hardware_bitmap_threshold_summary: If reader loads a blank image incrementally reduce the threshold.\nSelected: %s
strings.pref_always_decode_long_strip_with_ssiv_: Use legacy decoder for long strip reader
Affects performance. Only enable if reducing bitmap threshold doesn\'t fix blank image issues
strings.pref_auto_update_manga_on_mark_read: Update progress when marked as read
strings.pref_storage_location_info: Used for automatic backups, chapter downloads, and local source.
strings.private_settings: Include sensitive settings (e.g., tracker login tokens)
strings.clear_database_text: You’re about to remove entries from the database
strings.clear_database_history_warning: Read chapters and progress of non-library entries will be lost
strings.pref_update_library_manga_titles: Update library manga titles to match source
strings.pref_update_library_manga_titles_summary: Warning: if a manga is renamed, it will be removed from the download queue (if present).
strings.author: Author
strings.possible_duplicates_summary: You have entries in your library with a similar name.\n\nSelect an entry to migrate or add anyway.
strings.manga_interval_expected_update: New chapters predicted to be released in around %1$s, checking around every %2$s.
strings.manga_interval_expected_update_null: This manga is either completed, or there is no predicted release date.
strings.track_delete_text: This will remove the tracking locally.
strings.skipped_reason_not_in_release_period: Skipped because no release was expected today
strings.file_picker_uri_permission_unsupported: Failed to acquire persistent folder access. The app may behave unexpectedly.
strings.information_cloudflare_help: Tap here for help with Cloudflare
strings.migrationConfigScreen.removeDownloadsTit: Delete downloads of current entry after migration
strings.migrationConfigScreen.additionalSearchQu: Helps narrow down search results by adding additional keywords
strings.migrationConfigScreen.hideWithoutUpdates: Only show entry if the match has additional chapters
strings.migrationConfigScreen.enhancedOptionsWar: These options are slow and dangerous and may lead to restrictions from sources
strings.migrationConfigScreen.deepSearchModeSubt: Breaks down the title into keywords for a wider search
strings.migrationConfigScreen.prioritizeByChapte: If enabled, chooses the match furthest ahead. Otherwise, picks the first match by source priority.
strings.migrationListScreen.matchWithoutChapterT: No chapters found, this entry cannot be used for migration
